/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(B), A SPLIT SENTENCE/DEF:APPEARING VIA ZOOM/AJW/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 TO 2 YEARS,THE MIDDLE TERM/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(B), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:CJ 6 M/CTS: 1/CTW:9/MANSUPCTS:2/MANSUP:BALANCE/MANSUP1//X:DEFENDANT TO SERVE 6 MONTHS CJ AT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HENRY OHLHOFF RECOVERY PROGRAM/X: WHILE DEFENDANT IS AT THE PROGRAM, HE WILL BE ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING TO BE MONITORED BY APD AS A CONDITION OF HIS TERM IN THE HENRY OHLHOFF HOUSE AND MANDATORY SUPERVISION/X: IF HE SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETESTHE PROGRAM, THE SENTENCE WILL BE DEEMED SERVED AND HE WILL REMAIN ON MANDATORY SUPERVISION, IF HE DOES NOT COMPLETE THE PROGRAM SUCCESSFULLY, THE DEFENDANT AGRESS THAT 26 MONTHS IN COUNTY JAIL WILL BE IMPOSED WHICH WILL INCLUDE A CONSECUTIVE SENTENCE FROM COURT NUMBER 20011608,/X:COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION TO VICTIM, THE CITY AND   COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO- C21-0279 IN THE AMOUNT OF $8561,81/RESTV/RX/DTC/WS/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/11590/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/WEAP/CTORD:FORFEITURE OF SEIZED FUNDS IN THE AMOUNT OF $13,366,00/DISM3/
